title: HORDI pesticide regimen for tomato early + late blight
body: HORDI recommends three fungicide options for tomato early blight (Alternaria solani) and late blight (Phytophthora infestans): Mancozeb 80% WP at 20 g per 10 L water; Metalaxyl 8% + Mancozeb 64% WP at 12.5 g per 10 L; or Metiram 55% + Pyraclostrobin 5% WG at 8 ml per 10 L. Rotate products across applications to slow resistance build-up, and only apply at first lesion appearance. These dosages trace back to the DOA 2019 pesticide recommendation.
quote: Mancozeb 80% WP – 20g/10l; Metelaxyl 8%+ Mancozeb 64% WP -12.5g/10l; Metiram 55% + Pyraclostrobin 5% WG – 8ml/10l.
